description: Canonical EDEN eval suite. Intent cases test classifyIntent() in isolation. Response cases test full end-to-end behavior expectations.

intent_cases.label: basic modality + indication search
intent_cases.message: antibody therapies for breast cancer

intent_cases.label: pediatric qualifier should still be search
intent_cases.message: pediatric oncology

intent_cases.label: stage filter
intent_cases.message: phase 2 gene therapy assets

intent_cases.label: institution filter
intent_cases.message: show me what Stanford has in oncology

intent_cases.label: trending / hot signal
intent_cases.message: what's hot in GLP-1 right now

intent_cases.label: recency filter — last 30 days
intent_cases.message: new CAR-T assets added this month

intent_cases.label: aggregation — count query
intent_cases.message: how many gene therapy assets do you have?

intent_cases.label: aggregation — breakdown
intent_cases.message: break down assets by modality

intent_cases.label: back_ref — second asset
intent_cases.message: tell me more about the second one

intent_cases.label: back_ref — it / this one
intent_cases.message: what's the IP situation on this one?

intent_cases.label: back_ref requires prior assets — should fall back to search without
intent_cases.message: tell me more about the second one

intent_cases.label: comparative — vs
intent_cases.message: compare the MIT one to the Harvard one

intent_cases.label: comparative — which is better
intent_cases.message: which of these assets is further along in development?

intent_cases.label: definitional — what is
intent_cases.message: what is a PROTAC?

intent_cases.message: explain how CAR-T cell therapy works

intent_cases.message: show me my saved pipeline

intent_cases.label: create pipeline — should be search not pipeline
intent_cases.message: create a gene therapy pipeline for me

intent_cases.label: build pipeline — should be search not pipeline
intent_cases.message: build me a pipeline of oncology assets

intent_cases.label: supporting research — should trigger harvard live source
intent_cases.message: can you find supporting research on this?

intent_cases.label: academic papers — should trigger harvard live source
intent_cases.message: find me academic papers on CRISPR gene editing

intent_cases.label: synthesis — portfolio review
intent_cases.message: analyze everything I have saved and give me a summary

intent_cases.label: document generation
intent_cases.message: draft a due diligence checklist for this asset

intent_cases.label: pure greeting — should be conversational
intent_cases.message: good evening

intent_cases.label: thanks — should be conversational
intent_cases.message: thanks, that's helpful

intent_cases.label: company context opener — should trigger search
intent_cases.message: I'm building a company focused on pediatric oncology

intent_cases.label: pushback on no results — should re-trigger search not confirm empty
intent_cases.message: you're saying there's not a single asset focused on childhood cancer?

intent_cases.label: live source — clinical trials explicit
intent_cases.message: show me currently enrolling trials for PD-1 inhibitors

intent_cases.label: live source — patents explicit
intent_cases.message: who holds the patents in the CRISPR space?

intent_cases.message: assets targeting kinase signaling in solid tumors

response_expectations.label: zero results must not confirm nothing exists
result response should include asset names
follow-up pushback should search not confirm
response_expectations.message: you're saying there's not a single asset focused on childhood cancer?

response_expectations.label: greeting should not trigger asset search
